findings.annotation_source: Supplementary Table 3 provides DEGs used to annotate Postcapillary venules in prenatal skin. Listed as fine-grained annotation under broad 'Vascular endothelium' category.
findings.trajectory: Postcapillary venules lie on the venular differentiation pathway from early endothelial cells: early endothelial cells -> postcapillary venules -> venules. PLVAP is a characteristic venular marker (Fig. 4d, Extended Data Fig. 10a-c).
findings.macrophage_interactions: Macrophage subsets interact with postcapillary venule endothelial cells. Aggregated interactions were assessed (Extended Data Fig. 9a, Supplementary Table 28).
findings.temporal_presence: Endothelial cells are present throughout gestation (Fig. 1c, Extended Data Fig. 1d, Supplementary Table 4).
